name: Party Antipasto
recipeIngredient: 1 (14-ounce) can artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini according to package directions, omitting salt and fat; drain well.
2. Combine cooked tortellini, garbanzo beans, artichoke hearts, Pepperoncini peppers, cherry tomatoes, mushrooms, carrots, celery, green pepper, yellow squash, and olives in a large bowl.
3. Pour Antipasto Vinaigrette over vegetable mixture; toss gently to coat.
4. Cover and chill mixture at least 4 hours.
5. Transfer mixture to a large serving bowl using a slotted spoon.
Yield: 24 (1/2-cup) servings
